_comment: Performance baseline from Task 0110 benchmarks. Values from developer machine (Windows, Node 22, in-memory SQLite). CI runners may be slower — regression thresholds account for this.

serial_duration_ms.description: Serial baseline (1 pipeline) total duration in ms

burst_p99_write_ms.description: P99 write latency under burst load (8 pipelines) in ms

burst_p99_message_ms.description: P99 message delivery latency under burst load in ms

burst_memory_mb.description: Peak memory under burst load (8 pipelines) in MB
